items.title: United Capital, Part of Creative Planning, Acquires $4 Billion Texas Advisory Firm
items.description: The purchase of Apexium Financial is United Capital’s second acquisition of the year, and more are in the pipeline.

items.title: Executive Calls DEI Rollbacks 'Shortsighted' for Business
items.description: Ellen Kullman, board director for Amgen, Carbon, and Goldman Sachs weighs in on the delicate balance between stakeholders and shareholders when creating company policies that impact employee engagement.

items.title: Dow rallies 300 points to new record with shutdown set to end Wednesday: Live updates
items.description: Tuesday saw a tale of two markets emerge — the 30-stock Dow rallied more than 550 points to close at a record high, while the Nasdaq Composite slipped.
